---
title: "MLCommons Science Group Meeting Notes"
---

Welcome to the meeting notes repository. Use the navigation menu or the list below to browse through the meeting records.

## Meetings

### 2026 {#year-2026}

- **[2026 Summary](2026-summary.qmd)**
- [2026-04-07](2026-04-07-meeting.qmd)
- [2026-04-01](2026-04-01-meeting.qmd)
- [2026-03-24](2026-03-24-meeting.qmd)
- [2026-03-18](2026-03-18-meeting.qmd)
- [2026-03-10](2026-03-10-meeting.qmd)
- [2026-03-04](2026-03-04-meeting.qmd)
- [2026-02-24](2026-02-24-meeting.qmd)

### 2025 {#year-2025}

- **[2025 Summary](2025-summary.qmd)**
- [2025-12-16](2025-12-16-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-12-10](2025-12-10-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-12-02](2025-12-02-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-11-26](2025-11-26-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-11-12](2025-11-12-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-11-04](2025-11-04-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-10-29](2025-10-29-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-10-21](2025-10-21-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-10-15](2025-10-15-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-10-07](2025-10-07-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-10-01](2025-10-01-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-09-23](2025-09-23-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-09-17](2025-09-17-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-09-09](2025-09-09-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-09-03](2025-09-03-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-08-26](2025-08-26-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-08-20](2025-08-20-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-08-12](2025-08-12-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-08-06](2025-08-06-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-07-29](2025-07-29-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-07-23](2025-07-23-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-07-15](2025-07-15-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-07-09](2025-07-09-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-07-01](2025-07-01-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-06-25](2025-06-25-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-06-11](2025-06-11-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-06-03](2025-06-03-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-05-28](2025-05-28-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-05-20](2025-05-20-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-05-14](2025-05-14-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-05-06](2025-05-06-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-04-30](2025-04-30-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-04-22](2025-04-22-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-04-16](2025-04-16-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-04-02](2025-04-02-meeting.qmd)

- [2025-01-22](2025-01-22-meeting.qmd)
- [2025-01-08](2025-01-08-meeting.qmd)

### 2024 {#year-2024}

- **[2024 Summary](2024-summary.qmd)**
- [2024-12-11](2024-12-11-meeting.qmd)

- [2024-11-13](2024-11-13-meeting.qmd)
- [2024-11-04](2024-11-04-meeting.qmd)

- [2024-10-21](2024-10-21-meeting.qmd)
- [2024-10-16](2024-10-16-meeting.qmd)
- [2024-09-18](2024-09-18-meeting.qmd)

- [2024-02-21](2024-02-21-meeting.qmd)
- [2024-01-24](2024-01-24-meeting.qmd)

- **[2023 Summary](2023-summary.qmd)**

### 2022 {#year-2022}

- **[2022 Summary](2022-summary.qmd)**
- [2022-12-28](2022-12-28-meeting.qmd)

- [2022-11-30](2022-11-30-meeting.qmd)
- [2022-11-16](2022-11-16-meeting.qmd)
- [2022-11-02](2022-11-02-meeting.qmd)

- [2022-03-09](2022-03-09-meeting.qmd)
- [2022-02-23](2022-02-23-meeting.qmd)
- [2022-02-09](2022-02-09-meeting.qmd)
- [2022-01-26](2022-01-26-meeting.qmd)
- [2022-01-12](2022-01-12-meeting.qmd)

### 2021 {#year-2021}

- **[2021 Summary](2021-summary.qmd)**
- [2021-12-15](2021-12-15-meeting.qmd)

- [2021-00-10](2021-00-10-meeting.qmd)
